zh.lifeSummary: 當Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor於大約1042年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根時，他的父親Lord of Builth and Radnor Idnerth ap Cadwgan24歲，母親Efa Verch Bleddyn19歲。他和Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1140年在英國威爾斯拉德諾斯爾享年99歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor于大约1042年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根时，他的父亲Lord of Builth and Radnor Idnerth ap Cadwgan24岁，母亲Efa Verch Bleddyn19岁。他和Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales至少有6个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1140年在英国威尔斯拉德諾斯爾享年99岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, possibly having the sense ‘fortunate’ or alternatively from Celtic aodh ‘fire’.

en.lifeSummary: When Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor was born about 1042, in Glamorgan, Wales, his father, Lord of Builth and Radnor Idnerth ap Cadwgan, was 24 and his mother, Efa Verch Bleddyn, was 19. He had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales. He died in 1140, in Radnorshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 99.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor est né environ 1042, à Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Lord of Builth and Radnor Idnerth ap Cadwgan, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Efa Verch Bleddyn, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales. Il est décédé en 1140, à Radnorshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 99 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor um 1042 in Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord of Builth and Radnor Idnerth ap Cadwgan 24 und seine Mutter Efa Verch Bleddyn 19. Er hatte mit Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1140 im Alter von 99 Jahren in Radnorshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor è nato il circa 1042 nel Glamorgan, Galles, il suo padre, Lord of Builth and Radnor Idnerth ap Cadwgan, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Efa Verch Bleddyn, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales. Morì nel 1140, nel Radnorshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 99 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnorが約1042年にウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Lord of Builth and Radnor Idnerth ap Cadwganは24歳，母Efa Verch Bleddynは19歳であった。彼はRhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Walesとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1140年にイギリスウェールズラドノーシュアイアで99歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor(이)가 대략 1042년 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord of Builth and Radnor Idnerth ap Cadwgan(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Efa Verch Bleddyn(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1140년 영국 웨일스 라드노르실르에서 99세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor nasceu aproximadamente 1042, em Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Lord of Builth and Radnor Idnerth ap Cadwgan, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Efa Verch Bleddyn, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales. Ele faleceu em 1140, em Radnorshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 99 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor родился около 1042 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Lord of Builth and Radnor Idnerth ap Cadwgan было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Efa Verch Bleddyn, 19. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales. Он умер в 1140 г. в местности радноршир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 99 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor nació aproximadamente 1042, en Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Lord of Builth and Radnor Idnerth ap Cadwgan, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Efa Verch Bleddyn, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija con Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales. Murió en 1140, en Radnorshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 99 años.
